name: lib-starter
summary: Reusable library skeleton starter: a REAL, doc-tested exemplar module with a real public API, unit + integration tests, plus the release-automation starter pack's crate-producer package/release recipes (framework-required baseline for the library shape).
post-apply-notes: REAL and WORKING out of the box (Rust, matching the cli/gui/service quick-start family's stack): src/version_compare.rs is a real, minimal, dependency-free version-token comparator (parse/compare/format_token) — `cargo test` runs its unit tests, the doctests embedded in every public function's doc comment (`cargo test --doc`), and tests/version_compare_integration.rs (exercises ONLY the public `lib_app::version_compare` surface). SEAM: version_compare is illustrative — replace it with your project's real public API, keeping the doc-tested-example convention. package/release are REAL: `just package` delegates to the ALREADY-SHIPPED .claude/skills/grm-project-release/build_crate_artifact.py against publish.toml (Dependency Channel producer contract, dependency-channel-design.md §2b) — zero hand-written packaging code — emitting the vendored-crate trio (<name>-v{ver}.tar.gz + release.json + SHA256SUMS) into dist/; `just release` delegates to scripts/release.sh (guards + Cargo.toml bump + tag), whose archive step auto-detects `just package`. IMPORTANT DEVIATION FROM THE cli/gui/service PROFILES: lib's trio does NOT include grimoire-build-info.json (docs/web-app-deployment-protocol.md §8) — that stamp is Admin Console provenance for a DEPLOYED, RUNNING app, and a vendored library crate has no running Admin Console to provision; the crate-producer trio is the pre-existing, correct contract for this shape (see publish.toml's header comment). Rename BOTH Cargo.toml's `[package] name` and publish.toml's `[publish] name` together if you rename the crate. `run`/`stop`/`deploy`/`smoke` stay informative placeholders — a pure library has no server/live environment by default; implement only if the project ships a demo/CLI. Pick the language variant matching the project; quick-start-template applies that variant's test/build/lint/typecheck commands into the CLAUDE.md commands table + the v1.26 code-quality block (not edited inline) — kept for cross-profile consistency even though the shipped payload is concretely Rust. Config defaults are applied via model-effort-profile-switch + workflow-variant-switch. CATALOGUED FROM DAY ONE (#459): a pre-filled `component.json` ships at the project root, since the WHOLE scaffolded crate is the reusable, vendorable unit (unlike the cli/gui/service profiles, which scaffold terminal apps, not something another project would depend on) — rename its `id` alongside Cargo.toml/publish.toml if you rename the crate, and fill in `provides`/`requires` once the real public API exists. NOTE: `grm-component-registry`'s default scan paths are `components/`/`lib/`; a root-level component.json is NOT auto-discovered until the project adds `component-catalog.paths: ["."]` to `.claude/grimoire-config.json` — do that once you're ready for this crate to appear in `.claude/component-registry.json`.
